calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robin Lo, T:415.260.4464, defendant/judgment debtor/claimant appearing on his own behalf;
No appearance by plaintiff.

RULING: Hearing held. The Court questioned Mr. Lon regarding the basis for his claim, the source of the funds seized, etc. After hearing, and given plaintiff's failure to appear and defendant's testimony,

DEFENDANT ROBIN KWAN-HON LO'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted. The levying officer is directed to release all funds held to the judgment debtor.

Order signed in open court. The clerk shall serve the order on all parties, including a certified copy to the Los Angeles Sheriff's Office.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
